notes: Generated with built-in image generation on flat #ff00ff.
V3 uses wide source spacing so each form slices cleanly as a separate component.
Prompted for cast-matched medium detail: bold silhouettes, moderate garnish, and no bagel or lox language.
Converted with remove_chroma_key.py and sliced in components mode into 192x192 runtime sprites.
Tier 4 was scaled down inside its 192x192 transparent frame to match the current cast footprint.

Tier 4 clipping was corrected with a generated Brunch Tide Lobster reference saved at assets/sprites/source/benedict-lobster-brunch-tide-lobster-v4-chromakey.png and assets/sprites/transparent/benedict-lobster-brunch-tide-lobster-v4-transparent.png.
Static idle source-reference-pass only; not a production-ready animation package.
